// purpose: Vercel auto-detects Next.js + Yarn (because of yarn.lock) without this file. We keep it for explicit build pinning + env-var documentation so cloning + deploying stays predictable.
// envs: These keys must be set in Project Settings → Environment Variables. The frontend reads NEXT_PUBLIC_* at build time, so changing them requires a redeploy.
// regions: iad1 = US East. Switch to bom1 (Mumbai) once the backend moves regional, and Razorpay is closer to the user.
// headers: Mirror of the security defaults set in amplify.yml / netlify.toml so behaviour is consistent across hosts.
